case_title: CINDY TRENT VS. SEAN C MCKEAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CINDY TRENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEAN C MCKEAN IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRENT, CINDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKEAN, SEAN C $8,528.19 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,643.19, BASED ON THE BILLS PROVIDED AND NONPAYMENT OF RENTS, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $8,528.19 TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT -NOTICE OF MOTION MAILED TO PLANTIFF CINDY TRENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCKEAN, SEAN C HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO CINDY TRENT-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,547.46 FILED BY TRENT, CINDY AS TO DEFENDANT MCKEAN, SEAN C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 8/25/22. NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE & NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO CINDY TRENT-ADDRESSEE UNKNOWN/RTS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCKEAN, SEAN C

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CINDY TRENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEAN C MCKEAN IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506) (SEE NOTES)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SEAN C MCKEAN IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT FILED ON JUL-29-2022 IS VACATED. CONTINUED TO SEP-22-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF CINDY TRENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEAN C MCKEAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RAISED SAFETY CONCERN TO COURTROOM CLERK DUE TO A RESTRAINING ORDER THAT SHE HAS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEPUTY WU AND DEPUTY MALONEY. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2022 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF CINDY TRENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEAN C MCKEAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RAISED SAFETY CONCERN TO COURTROOM CLERK DUE TO A RESTRAINING ORDER THAT SHE HAS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEPUTY WU AND DEPUTY MALONEY. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRENT, CINDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCKEAN, SEAN C JUDGMENT AS FOLLOW: NEITHER PARTY PREVAILS MOOT IN VIEW OF 9/27/20 IN UD ACTION. 9/27/20 PLAINTIFF FILED UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION FOR HARASSMENT; DEFENDANT ADVISED TO NOT PAY RENT AND PLAINTIFF NOT ACCEPT RENT FOR MONTHS OCT, NOV, DEC, JAN. 2020/2021. PLAINTIFF VACATED PREMISES 1/21 UD ACTION DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
